# jentic-api-improve тАФ token usage and cost benchmark

> **Not yet measured.** This benchmark has not been run against live models. The matrix, input specs, and table shape below are in place; the number cells are placeholders (`тАФ`). Run `npm run bench:improve` with the prerequisites in `scripts/bench-improve.js`, then regenerate this doc with `--render-only`. No numbers here are fabricated.

Target: `@jentic/api-scorecard-cli` **1.9.3**. The engine `--with-llm` model is chosen by the engine and is the same across every cell, so differences reflect the coding-agent model, not the engine.

Each cell drives the skill through its standard 2-iteration loop 3 times (the skillтАЩs output is stochastic). **Score after** is the median and **Range** the minтАУmax over the cellтАЩs valid samples; token and cost columns are the mean over the same samples (median for the quality axis, mean for the cost axis). **Valid** shows how many of N samples were comparable тАФ non-comparable samples (ran without `--with-llm`, regressed vs baseline, or emitted a malformed summary) are excluded and listed below the table. Cost splits across two surfaces: the coding **agent**тАЩs own reasoning (from `claude -p`) and the scoring **engine**тАЩs `--with-llm` analysis (from each runтАЩs `token-usage.json`). See [`docs/llm-signals.md`](./llm-signals.md) for the engine LLM recipe.
